# ShelbyAI — Complete AI Tool Directory

> Comprehensive AI tool reviews, comparisons, and pricing guides. Every tool tested hands-on for 7-14 days.
> Full directory: https://www.shelby-ai.com/llms-full.txt
> Summary: https://www.shelby-ai.com/llms.txt

## About ShelbyAI
ShelbyAI is an independent AI tool review site for creators, freelancers, and small businesses. We test every tool for 7-14 days with real workflows. No sponsored rankings, no pay-to-play.

---

## All Reviewed Tools (31)

### ChatGPT
- Category: AI Writing Tools
- Best For: Versatile creators needing a reliable AI assistant for writing, coding, and analysis
- Pricing: Free, Plus $20/mo, Team $25/mo, Enterprise Custom
- Review: https://www.shelby-ai.com/reviews/chatgpt-review/
- Pricing Guide: https://www.shelby-ai.com/pricing/chatgpt/
- Alternatives: https://www.shelby-ai.com/alternatives/chatgpt/

### Claude AI
- Category: AI Writing Tools
- Rating: 4.0/5
- Best For: Writers and researchers seeking nuanced, thoughtful AI-generated content
- Pricing: Free, Pro $20/mo, Team $25/mo, Enterprise Custom
- Review: https://www.shelby-ai.com/reviews/claude-ai-review/
- Pricing Guide: https://www.shelby-ai.com/pricing/claude-ai/

### Jasper AI
- Category: AI Writing Tools
- Best For: Marketing teams and content creators who publish frequently
- Pricing: Pro $69/mo, Business Custom

- Pricing Guide: https://www.shelby-ai.com/pricing/jasper-ai/

- Category: AI Writing Tools

- Pricing: Free, Starter $49/mo, Advanced Custom

---

## Review Methodology

Every tool is tested for 7-14 days with real content workflows. Rating breakdown: Output Quality (30%), Value for Money (25%), Ease of Use (20%), Features (15%), Support (10%). No tool pays for placement. No sponsored rankings.

Full methodology: https://www.shelby-ai.com/how-we-review/
